name: Unity Workflow Tools
summary: Provides workflow helpers for repeated Unity editor tasks.

summaryI18n.zh: 为重复性的 Unity 编辑器任务提供工作流辅助。
summaryI18n.en: Provides workflow helpers for repeated Unity editor tasks.

author: Locus Test
description: Test plugin entry for validating external icon URLs, branch switching, and registry detail loading. The package is hosted in a separate public test repository.

descriptionI18n.zh: 用于验证外部 icon、多语言详情和注册表详情加载的测试条目，插件包托管在独立公开测试仓库中。
descriptionI18n.en: Test plugin entry for validating external icon URLs, branch switching, and registry detail loading. The package is hosted in a separate public test repository.
